violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed using tobacco outside of designated area. -Ashtrays behind the bar.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Home canned items in the refrigerator.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Can smell cigarette smoke in the facility.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed using tobacco outside of designated area. -Employees smoke behind the bar.
Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Home canned items in the refrigerator.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Areas behind the bar need cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Wall and ceiling by the vent hood need cleaned.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Can smell cigarette smoke in the establishment.
